title: Device Settings - Unpair Headset from Charge Stand
scenario: Unpairing headset from Charge Stand via Clear Trusted Device List does not show Charge Stand info in Software Update after re-pairing
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the phone.
Go to Home screen and tap on the connected headset to open Device Settings.
Tap 'Clear' next to 'Clear Trusted Device List'.
Verify the headset disconnects from the app.
Remove the headset from the app by navigating to Device Settings and selecting 'Forget Device' or similar.
Go to the phone's system Bluetooth settings and tap 'Forget' or 'Unpair' next to the headset.
Re-pair the headset with the phone by putting the headset into pairing mode (press and hold Bluetooth button) and selecting it from the phone's Bluetooth settings.
Open the Poly Studio Mobile app and confirm the headset is properly paired and connected.
Go to Home screen, tap on the headset to open Device Settings.
Navigate to Device Settings > Software Update.
Observe the Software Update screen for any information about the Charge Stand.
expected: 1. After clearing the trusted device list, the headset disconnects from the app. 2. After re-pairing, the headset is properly paired and connected to both the phone and app. 3. In Device Settings > Software Update, no information about the Charge Stand is shown.
